display_text: Earth Spirit Aghanim's Scepter: Enchant Remnant — Counters enemy initiation and burst damage by temporarily turning allies into invulnerable Stone Remnants, disrupting enemy combos and providing a defensive repositioning tool. Enables Earth Spirit to save allies from lethal damage or disable chains.
search_text: Earth Spirit Aghanim Scepter anti-burst anti-initiation save ally invulnerability reposition counter-disable

display_text: Earth Spirit Aghanim's Shard: Geomagnetic Grip — Enhances crowd control and repositioning by reducing cooldown and increasing pull speed/range, countering enemy positioning and enabling faster ally saves or enemy displacements during fights.
